zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Baynard於1322年出生在英國諾福爾可可爾吉可時，她的父親Robert Baynard33歲，母親Baroness Lucy Atte Eshe22歲。她和Edmund Thorpe至少有4個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於大約1399年2月在她的家鄉享年77歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Baynard于1322年出生在英国諾福爾可可爾吉可时，她的父亲Robert Baynard33岁，母亲Baroness Lucy Atte Eshe22岁。她和Edmund Thorpe至少有4个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于大约1399年2月在她的家乡享年77岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可。

nameMeanings.name: Baynard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Middle English personal name Bainard, via Norman French from ancient Germanic Beinhard, perhaps from bein- ‘leg, bone’ or a supposed element bagin- ‘dispute’ + -hard ‘hard, brave’.

variants.name: Bainer
meanings: English: perhaps a late development of Baynard , with loss of the final d. The earliest record found of this name in Britain, spelled Bayner, is dated 1546.

variants.name: Bunyard
meanings: English (Kent, of Norman origin): variant of   Baynard  .

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Baynard was born in 1322, in Colkirk, Norfolk, England, her father, Robert Baynard, was 33 and her mother, Baroness Lucy Atte Eshe, was 22. She had at least 4 sons and 2 daughters with Edmund Thorpe. She died about February 1399, in her hometown, at the age of 77, and was buried in Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Baynard est née en 1322, à Colkirk, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Robert Baynard, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Baroness Lucy Atte Eshe, avait 22 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles avec Edmund Thorpe. Elle est décédée environ février 1399, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterrée à Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Baynard 1322 in Colkirk, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Baynard 33 und ihre Mutter Baroness Lucy Atte Eshe 22. Sie hatte mit Edmund Thorpe mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb um Februar 1399 im Alter von 77 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Baynard è nata il nel 1322 nel Colkirk, Norfolk, England, sua padre, Robert Baynard, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Baroness Lucy Atte Eshe, aveva 22 anni. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie con Edmund Thorpe. Morì circa febbraio 1399, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 77 anni, e fu sepolta a Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Baynardが1322年にイギリスノーフォルクコルキルクで生まれた時，父Robert Baynardは33歳，母Baroness Lucy Atte Esheは22歳であった。彼女はEdmund Thorpeとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は約1399年2月に故郷で77歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Baynard(이)가 1322년 영국 노르폴크 코커크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Baynard(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Baroness Lucy Atte Eshe(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 Edmund Thorpe(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1399년 2월 그녀의 고향에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Baynard nasceu em 1322, em Colkirk, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Baynard, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Baroness Lucy Atte Eshe, tinha 22 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas com Edmund Thorpe. Ela faleceu aproximadamente fevereiro de 1399, em sua cidade natal, com 77 anos, e foi sepultada em Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Baynard родилась в 1322 г. в местности колкирк, норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert Baynard было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Baroness Lucy Atte Eshe, 22. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери от Edmund Thorpe. Она умерла около февраль 1399 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 77 лет и была похоронена в местности норфолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Baynard nació en 1322, en Colkirk, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Baynard, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Baroness Lucy Atte Eshe, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas con Edmund Thorpe. Murió aproximadamente febrero de 1399, en su pueblo, a la edad de 77 años, y fue sepultada en Norfolk, Inglaterra.
